primary_reference.title: Quantum mechanically derived AMBER-compatible heme parameters for various states of the cytochrome P450 catalytic cycle
primary_reference.authors: Shahrokh K, Orendt A, Yost GS, Cheatham TE III

method_claim_from_reference.geometry_optimization: B3LYP/LACVP as reported in the article
method_claim_from_reference.charge_derivation: RESP charges generated with RED-III as reported in the article
method_claim_from_reference.model_scope: F-HM and T-HM active-site models, not a full CYP protein

checked: reference DOI, PMID, PMCID, journal, volume, issue, pages
article method summary: B3LYP/LACVP and RED-III RESP
local frcmod headers cite Shahrokh, Orendt, Yost, Cheatham
local mol2 charge sums and Fe/O/S key charges
local Fe-S, Fe-O, and O-O key bonded parameters
not_checked: byte-for-byte comparison against the official PMC supplementary DOC because the direct download is protected by an NCBI CloudPMC proof-of-work challenge in this environment
chemical correctness, oxidation-state correctness, spin-state correctness, or transferability to every target protein

limitation: This provenance records source attribution and local file consistency checks. It does not validate chemical correctness.
